pageContext.name: Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest Canvas Art Print, a breathtaking fantasy illustration by artist Greg Rutkowski that will take your collection to the peaks of imagination.  On a journey through the winding mountains, a pair of intrepid adventurers encounter the secret summit lair of a gargantuan eagle. The beastly bird is ready to defend its home with its talons outstretched while the mage prepares a protective spell for the oncoming fight. At such a dizzying elevation above the frost and clouds, one false move could send the heroes plummeting to their deaths. Would you dare to face the fury of this mighty roc?  Each Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this fantasy wall art makes an epic addition to any fantasy collector's home gallery. Be sure to browse the entire Greg Rutkowski collection from Sideshow for even more dragons, wizards, and epic fantasy scenes you can add to your wall.  Soar to new heights when you bring home the Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest Fine Art Print by Greg Rutkowski today!
